(1, 1).title: EmptyCave
(1, 1).description:
Thin veins of damp quartz glint then vanish in the
surrounding black. A slow drip counts time. There is no other measure here.
The air tastes of stone dust and old water.
A single copper coin lies in the dust, face-down.
The southeastern passage is a tangle of fallen rock. No way through.

props.name: Gold
props.description: A small pouch containing 1 gold pieces.
props.announce: There's a small pouch of gold on the ground.

(2, 1).title: EmptyCave
(2, 1).description:
Shallow scratches form wavering lines on one wall,
like someone traced a thought they dared not speak.
A faint comfort seems to rest here, stubborn and warm.

props.name: Inscription
props.description: Words scratched into the wall. You think you can make out the words if you READ closely.
props.idle_message: There appears to be some words inscribed in the wall.
props.discovery_message: some words etched into the wall!
props.announce: There appears to be some words inscribed in the wall.
props.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.

(3, 1).title: EmptyCave
(3, 1).description:
A dusting of pale grit marks where the ceiling once
crumbled. A thin draft threads through a hairline seam,
carrying distant echoes that never resolve to words.
A loose fist-sized stone rests on a natural shelf, a faint red smear on one face.

(6, 1).title: EmptyCave
(6, 1).description:
Here the air sits heavier, as though the stone holds
its breath. A muted thud vibrates once beneath the
boots, then is gone, like a heart choosing silence.
Three claw-marks score the floor in parallel lines, deep and deliberate.

(7, 1).title: EmptyCave
(7, 1).description:
A squat chest rests in a quiet hollow. The stone
around it bears faint drag scars and a thin crescent
of splinters. The stillness hums, waiting to be broken.

props.name: Dried Rations
props.description: Preserved travel rations, still edible despite their age.
props.announce: There's a Dried Rations here.

props.name: Wooden Chest
props.description: A wooden chest. There may be something inside.
props.idle_message: A wooden chest is sitting here.
props.announce: A wooden chest is sitting here.

(1, 2).title: EmptyCave
(1, 2).description:
Clusters of pale mushrooms bead faint dew that
scatters the light into a ghostly spray. Their sweet
earth smell softens the harder scents of gravel.

(2, 2).title: JeanGameStartTile
(2, 2).description:
A shaft of silver light pierces the darkness above, illuminating
an altar of cold rock, loose stones heaped at its base
as though piled there by deliberate hands.
Ancient dust swirls in the beam, whispering of secrets buried in shadow.
The cavern breathes around you; alive, patient, waiting.
A low shelf of stone seals the southwestern corner; the northwest passage beyond the altar is choked with rubble.

props.name: Iron Key
props.description: A simple iron key, tarnished with age. It bears the faint inscription 'A.T.' on the bow.
props.announce: There's a Key here.

(3, 2).title: FirstPuzzle
(3, 2).description:
The stone here holds a muted warmth, a hush
pressing outward. Floor scuffs converge and stop at
a shallow depression. Behind the wall a slow drip
keeps an unhurried, hidden rhythm.

props.name: Wall Depression
props.description: A small depression in the wall. You may be able to PRESS on it.
props.idle_message: There's a small depression in the wall.
props.discovery_message: a small depression in the wall!
props.announce: There's a small depression in the wall.

(4, 2).title: RockLedgeWest
(4, 2).description:
Daylight dazzles as a ledge spans roaring blue below.
Spray lifts in glittering prisms before cold wind scatters it inland.
A small, sharp-eyed creature perches at the lip of the ledge, tail flicking.
It turns to watch as Jean approaches — not alarmed, just waiting.

props.name: Ferdie
props.description: An excitable mynx with a bit of a temper. Mostly harmless.

props.name: Idle
props.description: What?

(5, 2).title: RockLedgeEast
(5, 2).description:
The ledge narrows and ends at a sealed wall seam above a sheer drop.
Mountain silhouettes haze the distance, crowns lost
in traveling mist. Wind funnels here and thins your
breath with a clean, high cold.

props.name: Wall Depression
props.description: A shallow indentation beside the gap where the ledge ends. Something mechanical, perhaps - built to bridge what the stone cannot. You may be able to PRESS it.
props.idle_message: There's a shallow indentation in the rock beside the gap.
props.discovery_message: a shallow indentation in the rock!
props.announce: There's a shallow indentation in the rock beside the gap.

(6, 2).title: EmptyCave
(6, 2).description:
Condensation gathers in neat paired beads, then
drops in sync like practiced partners. The echo that
returns feels delayed, as though the dark is listening
before answering back.

(1, 3).title: EmptyCave
(1, 3).description:
Loose grit shifts with a soft crunch that feels loud
in the hush. A faint metallic tang lingers, maybe
lichen, maybe rusted memory.
Near the northeastern wall, a heel-print in the silt - fresh enough that the edges haven't crumbled - points toward a crack that narrows to a fist-width and stops.

(2, 3).title: EmptyCave
(2, 3).description:
Small things lie abandoned where a traveler paused
long ago. Fine moss outlines the prints that time has
blurred. Quiet patience gathers under each pebble.

props.name: Gold
props.description: A small pouch containing 27 gold pieces.
props.announce: There's a small pouch of gold on the ground.

props.name: Restorative
props.description:
A strange pink fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it seems to cause your wounds to immediately mend themselves.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass vial on the ground with an odd pink fluid inside and a label reading, 'Restorative.'

props.name: Inscription
props.description: A torn scrap of paper wedged into a crack. The handwriting is shaky but legible if you READ it.
props.idle_message: A scrap of paper is wedged into a crack in the wall.
props.discovery_message: a scrap of paper wedged in the wall!
props.announce: A scrap of paper is wedged into a crack in the wall.
props.text:
Day 18: Found a wooden chest near the eastern alcove, left by some previous soul.
Hid the key beneath some loose stones near the altar - a natural landmark in this cave.
If anyone finds this, search there.
- Aldric

(6, 3).title: EmptyCave
(6, 3).description:
Sound threads from several unseen corridors, weaving
a restless hush. The air cools at the ankles only, a
subtle drift hinting at deeper chambers.
A rusted iron ring is sunk into the wall at chest height, its original purpose unclear.

(7, 3).title: EmptyCave
(7, 3).description:
A shallow pocket terminates here. Damp stone curves
around like a closing palm. The air is thick with
the scent of wet earth and something faintly floral,
as if the cave itself were exhaling.

props.name: Restorative
props.description:
A strange pink fluid of questionable chemistry.
Drinking it seems to cause your wounds to immediately mend themselves.
props.announce: Jean notices a small glass vial on the ground with an odd pink fluid inside and a label reading, 'Restorative.'

props.name: Gold Chain
props.description:
A shiny gold chain. 
Worn to impress. An excellent gift for a lady.
props.announce: There's a Gold Chain here.

props.name: Silver Ring
props.description:
A shiny silver ring. 
A small bauble favored by people of typically lower class.
props.announce: There's a Silver Ring here.

props.name: Reinforced Studded Cloth Hood
props.description: Stained cloth hood. Enough to conceal your face, but that's about it.
props.announce: There's a Reinforced Studded Cloth Hood here.

props.name: Steel Lockbox
props.description: A small steel lockbox, partially buried in rubble. Its surface is etched with protective runes.
props.idle_message: A steel lockbox is partially hidden among the rocks.
props.announce: A steel lockbox is partially hidden among the rocks.

(5, 4).title: EmptyCave
(5, 4).description:
A cool upward draft grazes the floor, carrying a
mineral tang and the faint aftertaste of river spray.
Half circles scratched in dust suggest boots pacing impatiently.

(6, 4).title: EmptyCave
(6, 4).description:
Walls pinch close, polished where shoulders must have
brushed. A residual warmth clings in narrow eddies,
then thins, urging movement onward.
Wax drippings harden in a thin line along one wall - someone walked this corridor with a candle, recently.

(5, 5).title: EmptyCave
(5, 5).description:
The floor sags in a shallow basin where colder air pools.
A faint, steady drip marks time without counting it.
This place feels chosen - the low ceiling, the closed curve of stone,
the corner where a man might set his back to the rock
and face the dark for the last time.
The quiet here is different from the quiet elsewhere. It keeps a shape.

props.name: Dull Medallion
props.description:
A rather unremarkable medallion. 
It's face is dull, and seems to swallow any light unlucky enough to land upon it. 
It may have been a family heirloom or a memento of a lost love.
props.announce: There's a Dull Medallion here.

props.name: Gold
props.description: A small pouch containing 133 gold pieces.
props.announce: There's a small pouch of gold on the ground.

props.name: Tattered Journal
props.description: A water-stained leather journal, its pages brittle and faded. The merchant's final thoughts are barely legible.
props.announce: There's a Tattered Journal here.

props.name: Cloth Boots
props.description: Simple stitched cloth boots. Keeps feet warm but offers almost no protection.
props.announce: There's a Cloth Boots here.

props.name: Remains
props.description: The remains of a poor traveler. There's not much left besides grey bone and tattered clothes.
props.idle_message: The old remains of a traveler are here, leaning against the rock wall.
props.announce: The old remains of a traveler are here, leaning against the rock wall.
